project_name: ML Forge - Visual LLM Pipeline Editor

layout.grid_system: Use CSS Grid for the main layout: Sidebar (250px), Canvas (1fr), Properties (300px)
layout.spacing: Generous spacing in panels (p-4, p-6), tight spacing in nodes (p-2, gap-2)

nodes.base: bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-md min-w-[250px]
nodes.header: px-4 py-2 border-b border-border font-mono text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center justify-between

panels.sidebar: bg-background/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-background/60 border-r border-border h-full flex flex-col
panels.properties: bg-background/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-background/60 border-l border-border h-full overflow-y-auto

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INITIAL SETUP: Create the directory structure first. Ensure 'frontend' and 'backend' are at the root level.
2. FRONTEND: Initialize a React app with Vite. Install 'reactflow', 'lucide-react', 'clsx', 'tailwind-merge', 'framer-motion'.
3. TAILWIND: Configure tailwind.config.js with the colors specified in the design system.

4. COMPONENTS: Create a 'CustomNode' component that wraps the node logic. It should accept 'data' (label, inputs, controls) and render the appropriate Shadcn UI components (Input, Select, Slider) inside.
5. BACKEND: Set up FastAPI with a '/run' endpoint that accepts the JSON graph. Create a 'GraphParser' class that topologically sorts the nodes and executes them.
6. EXECUTION: The backend should use 'transformers', 'peft', and 'trl' to generate the Python code. Implement a 'CodeGenerator' class.
7. WEBSOCKETS: Implement a WebSocket endpoint '/ws/{client_id}' for streaming logs.
8. NODE TYPES: Implement at least: 'DatasetNode' (file path input), 'ModelNode' (model ID input), 'TrainingNode' (hyperparams).
9. EXPORT: Add a button in the UI to 'Export Python Code' which calls the backend to generate the script.
CRITICAL: Ensure the UI is dense and professional. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all data-related text.
universal_guidelines: Use distinct colors for different node types (Data, Model, Training).
Ensure high contrast for text (WCAG AA).
All interactive elements must have hover states.
